game_name: Tiny Toon Adventures 2: Trouble in Wackyland

special_mechanics.name: Character-Specific Rides
special_mechanics.description: Five different playable characters, each with unique ride mechanics: Plucky (bumper car), Hamton (train), Babs (rollercoaster), Furrball (log ride), Buster (funhouse exploration)

special_mechanics.name: Obstacle Navigation
special_mechanics.description: Buster must navigate numerous obstacles in the Funhouse stage before boss encounter

tier_notes: Tier 3 data - No quantified physics parameters available in sources. Game reviewed as having unforgiving gameplay and challenging ride mechanics, but specific movement values, gravity constants, and jump physics are not documented in accessible sources.
sources_used: The Cutting Room Floor - Tiny Toon Adventures 2
Wikipedia - Tiny Toon Adventures 2: Trouble in Wackyland
